name: Saline nkịtị (0.9% NaCl)
description: Isotonic crystalloid mmiri mmiri. A na-eji maka mmụghachi mmiri mmiri IV. Na ujo hemorrhagic, jiri nlezianya mee ihe - nnukwu mpịakọta na-akawanye njọ coagulopathy (hyperchloremic acidosis, dilutional coagulopathy). A na-ahọrọ hypotension na-ekwe ka ọ banye n'ime trauma na-echere njikwa ọbara ọgbụgba.
indications: Mweghachi mmiri mmiri (na ịkpachara anya na ujo hemorrhagic)
Hypovolemia sitere na ihe ndị na-abụghị hemorrhagic
dose: Ujo hemorrhagic: Oke na 1L max na-echere njikwa ọbara ọgbụgba (hypotension na-enye ohere). Ebumnuche SBP 80-90 mmHg n'ime trauma, 90 mmHg na TBI. Hypovolemia na-abụghị hemorrhagic: 500 ml boluses, nyochaghachi.
contraindications: Ibu oke mmiri / pulmonary edema (ihe metụtara)
warnings: Nnukwu mpịakọta na-akpata hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis na dilutional coagulopathy -- na-akawanye njọ triad na-egbu egbu na trauma.
A na-ahọrọ Lactated Ringer's (LR) maka iweghachite trauma buru ibu.
Akwụghachila iweghachite n'ime oke trauma tupu ịwa ahụ (hypotension na-enye ohere).

pediatric.dose: 20 ml/kg IV bolus, nyochaghachi. Tinyegharịa max x3 (60 ml/kg mkpokọta) tupu ịtụle ngwaahịa ọbara.

obstetric.note: Ntugharị ọkọlọtọ na ọbara ọgbụgba nwa. Mweghachi nke mmiri na-eme ihe ike kwesịrị ekwesị maka ọbara ọgbụgba mgbe amuchara nwa tupu ngwaahịa ọbara dị.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
